claim_audit_results.claim_summary: MAESTRO comprises 9 work packages over 48 months
WP leadership assignments: ATU leads WP1/WP2, BIIS leads WP3, CERIA leads WP4, NIHS leads WP5, ISIA leads WP6, ELI leads WP7, FIIT leads WP8, BAL leads WP9
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/roles.json (wp_lead fields for all 8 partners match claimed assignments); docs/tier3_project_instantiation/architecture_inputs/workpackage_seed.json (lead fields for WP1–WP9 match)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: External Tool and API Orchestration Layer is a cross-cutting capability integrated across all pillars (OBJ-8)
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/architecture_inputs/objectives.json (OBJ-8: title 'External Tool and API Orchestration Layer', pillar 'Cross-cutting — External Tool and API Orchestration', contributing_partners span all pillars)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Dependency map has 16 directed edges: WP2/WP3/WP4 each feed WP5/WP6/WP7, converging into WP8 then WP9
claim_audit_results.source_ref: traceability_footer references docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase3_wp_design/wp_structure.json (dependency_map.edges); Tier 4 not in readable input set. Inference: described topology yields 3 pillars × 3 demos (9) + 3 pillars → WP8 (3) + 3 demos → WP8 (3) + WP8 → WP9 (1) = 16 edges, consistent with claim.

traceability_footer references docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase4_gantt_milestones/gantt.json (critical_path); Tier 4 not in readable input set. Inference: path through neuro-symbolic planning pillar (WP2) to healthcare demonstrator (WP5) to integration (WP8) is plausible given WP2 end_month=36 and WP5 end_month=42 from workpackage_seed.json.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Twenty deliverables across 9 WPs including D1-02 Data management plan (M6) and D9-01 Dissemination and exploitation plan (M6)
claim_audit_results.source_ref: traceability_footer references docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase3_wp_design/wp_structure.json (deliverables); Tier 4 not in readable input set. Deliverable count and identifiers are Phase 3 outputs not present in Tier 3 seed data; cannot verify exact count of 20 from readable inputs.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Eleven milestones spanning MS1 (Architecture specification, M3) to MS11 (Project completion, M48); MS6 (Integrated framework v1.0, M24) and MS8 (Research pillar targets, M36) as key checkpoints
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/architecture_inputs/milestones_seed.json (11 milestones: MS1 month=3 title matches, MS6 month=24 title='Integrated MAESTRO framework v1.0 with tool orchestration layer', MS8 month=36 title='Research pillar targets achieved', MS11 month=48 title='Project completion and final review')

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Three governance bodies: General Assembly (biannual, all 8 partners), Project Management Committee (quarterly, ATU chair), Ethics and Quality Oversight Committee (ATU, NIHS)
claim_audit_results.source_ref: traceability_footer references docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (governance_matrix); Tier 4 not in readable input set. Governance structure is consistent with standard EU RIA management but specific composition not verifiable from Tier 3 data.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Risk register: 11 risks; RISK-01 neuro-symbolic integration (medium/high, modular architecture fallback), RISK-04 clinical data access (medium/high, public datasets), RISK-10 pillar integration (medium/high, shared API contracts M1-M3)
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/architecture_inputs/risks.json (11 risks listed; RISK-01: probability=medium, impact=high, mitigation includes 'modular architecture'; RISK-04: probability=medium, impact=high, mitigation includes 'publicly available clinical datasets'; RISK-10: probability=medium, impact=high, mitigation includes 'shared data representations, API contracts...in M1–M3')

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Resources validated via budget gate with zero blocking inconsistencies
claim_audit_results.source_ref: traceability_footer references docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase7_budget_gate/budget_gate_assessment.json (gate_pass_declaration); Tier 4 not in readable input set. Budget gate pass is a Phase 7 output; cannot verify pass status or zero-inconsistency count from Tier 3 data.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Consortium comprises 8 partners from 8 countries (DE, FR, NL, IT, SE, CH, FI, ES), combining academic institutions with private industry
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/partners.json (8 partners: ATU/DE, CERIA/FR, BIIS/NL, ISIA/IT, NIHS/SE, ELI/CH, BAL/FI, FIIT/ES; organisation_types include HES and PRC confirming academic-industry mix)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Partner capabilities: ATU neuro-symbolic AI, CERIA multi-agent coordination, BIIS memory-augmented networks/RAG, ISIA factory environments/digital twins, NIHS clinical datasets/ethics, ELI logistics data, BAL LLM engineering/deployment, FIIT evaluation/EDIH
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/capabilities.json (ATU: 'Neuro-symbolic AI and hybrid reasoning systems'; CERIA: 'Multi-agent systems and distributed AI'; BIIS: 'Memory-augmented neural networks', 'Retrieval-augmented generation'; ISIA: 'Digital twin modelling and simulation'; NIHS: 'Clinical decision support systems', 'AI ethics in healthcare'; ELI: 'Global logistics network operations'; BAL: 'Large language model development', 'Production-grade AI deployment'; FIIT: 'AI evaluation and benchmarking', 'EDIH network coordination')

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Timeline: pillar specifications by M12-M18, software prototypes by M30-M36, demonstrators deploy from M18 and complete validation by M42
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/architecture_inputs/milestones_seed.json provides partial support: MS2(M12) planning engine v1.0, MS3(M12) memory architecture v1.0, MS4(M15) protocol specs → pillar specs M12-M15 (section says M12-M18, broader window); MS7(M30) demonstrator v1.0 deployment, MS8(M36) pillar targets → prototypes M30-M36 confirmed; MS9(M42) demonstrator validation complete confirmed. 'Deploy from M18' not precisely confirmed — workpackage_seed.json shows WP5/6/7 start M12 and MS7 initial deployment at M30.
